fault_hypothesis: On line 66, when the raw delay exceeds max_delay, the capped value is set to `max_delay + base` instead of simply `max_delay`, causing the returned delay to exceed the configured maximum.

constraints.intent: After capping, delay__2 must not exceed max_delay; the bug adds base to max_delay making it too large.
The capped delay should equal exactly max_delay, not max_delay + base.
After the then-branch that applies the cap, the resulting delay must not exceed max_delay.
The returned delay must never exceed max_delay regardless of inputs.
